ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie based on user reviews */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the movie plot */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age rating/certification of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography or about section */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is public */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to submit the rating */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was provided */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is public */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to submit the review */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler_tag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Director's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile picture */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings_summary" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating given to the movie */,
  "lowest_rating" INTEGER /* Lowest rating given to the movie */,
  "rating_variance" REAL /* Variance in user ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date the movie was last viewed */,
  "unique_viewers" INTEGER /* Number of unique viewers */,
  "average_view_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration viewers spent watching the movie in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., rated, reviewed) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_device_used" TEXT /* Device used to perform the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
